title: Telegram Settings
description: Configure your Telegram bot to send and receive messages with customers.

botToken.label: Bot Token
botToken.help: Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram to get your token.

webhook.label: Webhook URL
webhook.description: This URL is automatically configured when you save your bot token.

deepLink.title: Customer Connection Link
deepLink.description: Share this link with customers so they can connect to your bot. Replace the customer ID placeholder with the actual customer ID.

disconnect.title: Disconnect Telegram bot?
disconnect.description: This will remove the bot configuration and stop receiving messages. Existing conversation history will be preserved.

qr.title: Connect on Telegram
qr.description: Scan this QR code to chat with us on Telegram.
qr.emailBody:
Hi {name},

You can now chat with us on Telegram for updates on your vehicle.

Click this link to connect: {link}

Thank you!

invoiceQr.label: Show QR code on invoices
invoiceQr.description: Display a Telegram QR code on shared digital invoices so customers can connect.

enable.label: Enable Telegram
enable.hint: Show Telegram in the sidebar and on customer pages.
enable.disabledInfo: Telegram is currently disabled. Enable it to start sending and receiving messages via Telegram.
